title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 91.460 - Board to be nonpartisan — salary — bond
text:
91.460.  Board to be nonpartisan — salary — bond. — Not more than two members of said board shall belong to the same political party, and its administration shall in all respects be entirely nonpartisan.  Each member of said board shall receive such salary and give such bond as may be prescribed by ordinance.
(RSMo 1939 § 7797) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7652; 1919 § 9090; 1909 § 9915
